revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Europe_topic here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#invoke:Navbox|navbox | name = {{{name|Europe topic}}} | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | border = {{{border|}}} | navbar = {{{navbar|}}} | titlestyle = {{{titlestyle|}}} | title = {{ #if:{{{notitle|}}}||{{ #if:{{{title|}}} |{{{title}}} |{{#ifexist:{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}}_Europe{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}} | [[{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Europe{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}]] | {{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Europe{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}} }} }} }} | image = {{{image|}}} | groupstyle = {{{groupstyle|}}} | listclass = hlist | bodyclass = {{{bodyclass|}}} | above = {{{above|}}} | abovestyle = {{{abovestyle|}}} | aboveclass = {{{aboveclass|}}} | below = {{{below|}}} | belowstyle = {{{belowstyle|}}} | belowclass = {{{belowclass|}}} | group1 = Sovereign states | list1 = * Kingdom}}}}{{#switch:{{lc:{{{UK_only|}}}}}|no|n|0={{#if:{{{ENG|♦}}}| **[[{{{ENG|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} England{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|England]]}}{{#if:{{{NIR|♦}}}| **[[{{{NIR|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Northern Ireland{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Northern Ireland]]}}{{#if:{{{SCT|♦}}}| **[[{{{SCT|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Scotland{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Scotland]]}}{{#if:{{{WLS|♦}}}| **[[{{{WLS|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Wales{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Wales]]}}|#default={{#if:{{{ENG|}}}{{{NIR|}}}{{{SCT|}}}{{{WLS|}}}| {{yesno|{{{ENG|}}}|yes=**[[{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} England{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}|England]]|def=**[[{{{ENG}}}|England]] }}{{yesno|{{{NIR|}}}|yes=**[[{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Northern Ireland{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}|Northern Ireland]]|def=**[[{{{NIR}}}|Northern Ireland]] }}{{yesno|{{{SCT|}}}|yes=**[[{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Scotland{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}|Scotland]]|def=**[[{{{SCT}}}|Scotland]] }}{{yesno|{{{WLS|}}}|yes=**[[{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Wales{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}|Wales]]|def=**[[{{{WLS}}}|Wales]] }} }} }}{{#if:{{{VA|♦}}}|{{#ifexist:{{{VA|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Vatican City{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}} |* [[{{{VA|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Vatican City{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Vatican City]] }}}} | group2 = States with limited
recognition | list2 = {{#if:{{{AB|♦}}}|* [[{{{AB|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Abkhazia{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Abkhazia]] }}{{#if:{{{XK|♦}}}|* [[{{{XK|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Kosovo{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Kosovo]] }}{{#if:{{{TRNC|♦}}}|* [[{{{TRNC|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Northern Cyprus{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Northern Cyprus]] }}{{#if:{{{SO|♦}}}|* [[{{{SO|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} South Ossetia{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|South Ossetia]] }}{{#if:{{{PMR|♦}}}|* [[{{{PMR|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Transnistria{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Transnistria]] }} | group3 = Dependencies and
other entities | list3 = {{#if:{{{countries_only|}}} | | {{#if:{{{AX|♦}}}|* [[{{{AX|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Åland{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Åland]] }}{{#if:{{{FO|♦}}}|* [[{{{FO|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{article|yes}}}|yes|the}} Faroe Islands{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Faroe Islands]] }}{{#if:{{{GI|♦}}}|* [[{{{GI|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Gibraltar{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Gibraltar]] }}{{#if:{{{GG|♦}}}|* [[{{{GG|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Guernsey{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Guernsey]] }}{{#if:{{{IM|♦}}}|* [[{{{IM|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{article|yes}}}|yes|the}} Isle of Man{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Isle of Man]] }}{{#if:{{{JE|♦}}}|* [[{{{JE|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Jersey{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Jersey]] }}{{#if:{{{SJ|♦}}}|* [[{{{SJ|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Svalbard{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Svalbard]] }} }} | group4 = Other entities | list4 = {{#if:{{{no_other_entities|}}} | | {{#if:{{{no_EU|}}} | |{{#if:{{{EU|♦}}} |{{#ifexist:{{{EU|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{article|yes}}}|yes|the}} European Union{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}} |* [[{{{EU|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{article|yes}}}|yes|the}} European Union{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|European Union]] }} }} }}{{#if:{{{no_EEA|}}} | |{{#if:{{{EEA|♦}}} |{{#ifexist:{{{EEA|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{article|yes}}}|yes|the}} European Economic Area{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}} |* [[{{{EEA|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{article|yes}}}|yes|the}} European Economic Area{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|European Economic Area]] }} }} }}{{#if:{{{no_SMOM|}}} | |{{#ifexist:{{{SMOM|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{article|yes}}}|yes|the}} Sovereign Military Order of Malta{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}} |* [[{{{SMOM|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{article|yes}}}|yes|the}} Sovereign Military Order of Malta{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Sovereign Military Order of Malta]] }} }} }} }} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]

{{iso2country|GB|article={{{article|yes}}}}}{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|United Kingdom]]|{{#if:{{{ENG|}}}{{{NIR|}}}{{{SCT|}}}{{{WLS|}}}{{yesno|{{{UK_only|}}}|no=1|yes=|blank=}}|United Kingdom}}}}{{#switch:{{lc:{{{UK_only|}}}}}|no|n|0={{#if:{{{ENG|♦}}}| **[[{{{ENG|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} England{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|England]]}}{{#if:{{{NIR|♦}}}| **[[{{{NIR|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Northern Ireland{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Northern Ireland]]}}{{#if:{{{SCT|♦}}}| **[[{{{SCT|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Scotland{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Scotland]]}}{{#if:{{{WLS|♦}}}| {{{suffix|}}}}}}|Wales]]|def=**[[{{{WLS}}}|Wales]] }} }} }}{{#if:{{{VA|♦}}}|{{#ifexist:{{{VA|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Vatican City{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}} |* [[{{{VA|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Vatican City{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Vatican City]] }}}} | group2 = States with limited
recognition | list2 = {{#if:{{{AB|♦}}}|* [[{{{AB|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Abkhazia{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Abkhazia]] }}{{#if:{{{XK|♦}}}|* [[{{{XK|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Kosovo{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Kosovo]] }}{{#if:{{{TRNC|♦}}}|* [[{{{TRNC|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Northern Cyprus{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Northern Cyprus]] }}{{#if:{{{SO|♦}}}|* [[{{{SO|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} South Ossetia{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|South Ossetia]] }}{{#if:{{{PMR|♦}}}|* [[{{{PMR|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Transnistria{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Transnistria]] }} | group3 = Dependencies and
other entities | list3 = {{#if:{{{countries_only|}}} | | {{#if:{{{AX|♦}}}|* [[{{{AX|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Åland{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Åland]] }}{{#if:{{{FO|♦}}}|* [[{{{FO|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{article|yes}}}|yes|the}} Faroe Islands{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Faroe Islands]] }}{{#if:{{{GI|♦}}}|* [[{{{GI|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Gibraltar{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Gibraltar]] }}{{#if:{{{GG|♦}}}|* [[{{{GG|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Guernsey{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Guernsey]] }}{{#if:{{{IM|♦}}}|* [[{{{IM|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{article|yes}}}|yes|the}} Isle of Man{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Isle of Man]] }}{{#if:{{{JE|♦}}}|* [[{{{JE|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Jersey{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Jersey]] }}{{#if:{{{SJ|♦}}}|* [[{{{SJ|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} Svalbard{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Svalbard]] }} }} | group4 = Other entities | list4 = {{#if:{{{no_other_entities|}}} | | {{#if:{{{no_EU|}}} | |{{#if:{{{EU|♦}}} |{{#ifexist:{{{EU|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{article|yes}}}|yes|the}} European Union{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}} |* [[{{{EU|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{article|yes}}}|yes|the}} European Union{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|European Union]] }} }} }}{{#if:{{{no_EEA|}}} | |{{#if:{{{EEA|♦}}} |{{#ifexist:{{{EEA|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{article|yes}}}|yes|the}} European Economic Area{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}} |* [[{{{EEA|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{article|yes}}}|yes|the}} European Economic Area{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|European Economic Area]] }} }} }}{{#if:{{{no_SMOM|}}} | |{{#ifexist:{{{SMOM|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{article|yes}}}|yes|the}} Sovereign Military Order of Malta{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}} |* [[{{{SMOM|{{{1|{{{prefix|}}}}}} {{#ifeq:{{{article|yes}}}|yes|the}} Sovereign Military Order of Malta{{{2| {{{suffix|}}}}}}}}}|Sovereign Military Order of Malta]] }} }} }} }} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
